Join IAAA

Join India's Largest
Aerospace Network

Connect with 10,000+ members across 100+ institutions nationwide

Most Popular

Student Membership

₹1,000/ year

Access certified aerospace courses & innovation contests. Apply for internships and startup mentorship via IAAA networks. Compete in IAAA National Innovation Challenge.

Join as Student Member

What You Get

  • 4–10 certified courses per year
  • National contests & internships
  • Workshops and Training Programs
  • Official IAAA Certificate & Career Support
  • Access certified aerospace courses & innovation contests
  • Apply for internships and startup mentorship via IAAA networks
  • Compete in IAAA National Innovation Challenge
  • Annual certificate and national recognition

Benefits Include

  • Network with industry leaders
  • Mentor student members
  • Contribute to IAAA's educational and research initiatives
  • Professional recognition and certification
  • Event participation and speaking opportunities
  • Access to IAAA resources and publications
Volunteer Program

Professional Membership

FreeVolunteer Member

For practicing engineers, scientists, and professionals who wish to contribute to IAAA's educational and research initiatives. Network with industry and mentor students.

Apply as Professional
For Institutions

Institutional Membership

CustomPricing

For colleges, universities, and schools hosting IAAA Clubs, Regional Hubs, or PTDC Centres — enabling aerospace programs, FDPs, and national recognition.

Register Your Institution

Institution Benefits

  • Host IAAA Collegiate Clubs
  • Establish Regional Hubs or PTDC Centres
  • Enable aerospace programs and FDPs
  • National recognition for institution
  • Faculty development support
  • Access to industry partnerships
Why Join IAAA

Why Join IAAA?

Competitions

National innovation challenges and hackathons

Startup Support

From idea to launch with IASF mentorship

Certifications

Globally recognized aerospace credentials

Network

10,000+ members and 80+ industry partners

IAAAAerospace Institute

Empowering India's Aerospace Community — From School to Sky. India's premier institute for aerospace education, training, and research.

Accredited by

CTDS TNNSDC

  • B.S. Program (IIT Madras)
